html:
Exclusive to:

The Windbreaker is a craftable Dress Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 2 Blubber, 1 Rope, and 1 Cloth to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its durability.

When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 50%, and prevents the player from being slowed by Strong Winds if they go against the wind.

It also reduces the Sealnado’s vacuum radius while equipped.

Trivia

  • The Windbreaker's design used to be almost identical to that of the Puffy Vest or Breezy Vest, only white.
  • "To break wind" is a euphemism for flatulence, something remarked upon by some of the examination quotes.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Willow wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wendy wearing a Windbreaker.
  • WX-78 wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Woodie wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wes wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Maxwell wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Webber wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Walani wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Warly wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wilbur wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wilba wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wormwood wearing a Windbreaker.
  • Wheeler wearing a Windbreaker.

“The wind doesn't stand a chance!”
–Wilson
“Wind is the enemy of fire.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang master of breaking wind!”
–Wolfgang
“The wind's tendrils cannot hold me!”
–Wendy

–Woodie
“Sigh.”
–Maxwell

–Wagstaff
“I shall break the wind with every step!”
–Wigfrid
“Wind can't hold us back!”
–Webber
“The wind slips right around me!”
–Walani
“While it is rude to break wind in public, I will make an exception.”
–Warly
“Ol'Woodlegs be an expert windbreaker!”
–Woodlegs
“IT BREAKETH WIND”
–Wilba
“Cozy”
–Wormwood
“I'll never get blown off course with this jacket.”
–Wheeler
The Windbreaker is a craftable Dress Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 2 Blubber, 1 Rope, and 1 Cloth to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 33.3% of its durability.
When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 50%, and prevents the player from being slowed by Strong Winds if they go against the wind.
It also reduces the Sealnado’s vacuum radius while equipped.

The Windbreaker's design used to be almost identical to that of the Puffy Vest or Breezy Vest, only white.
"To break wind" is a euphemism for flatulence, something remarked upon by some of the examination quotes.

The '''Windbreaker''' is a craftable [[Dress]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires 2 [[Blubber]], 1 [[Rope]], and 1 [[Cloth]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 33.3% of its durability.

When worn during [[Rain]], it protects against [[Wetness]] gain by 50%, and prevents the player from being slowed by [[Strong Winds]] if they go against the wind.

It also reduces the [[Sealnado]]’s vacuum radius while equipped.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Windbreaker's design used to be almost identical to that of the [[Puffy Vest]] or [[Breezy Vest]], only white.
* "To break wind" is a euphemism for flatulence, something remarked upon by some of the examination quotes.
